calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2003 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2002 Continued To Jan-13-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On November 14,2002
Off Calendar Nov-15-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing on Default Prove-Up. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patrick Heald. Mark Joseph Romeo, Esq. appeared for the plaintiff. Default entered against Kaase Enterprises. Witness Jose Cassidy was sworn and examined. The following exhibits were introduced for identification and marked into evidence: 1) Contract Agreement; 2) Itemization of Damages; 3) Report - March 7,2002; 4) Photographs - group; 5) Repair Invoices; and 6) Letters of sponsorship. The Court having heard evidence and good cause appearing grants judgment as follows: Principal: $26,990.00; Attorney Fees: $3,000.00; Pre-judgment Interest: $1,914.00; Costs: $343.00 for a total judgment of $32,247.00. Order signed in open court.

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On November 5,2002.
Off Calendar Nov-05-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on calendar this day for hearing on default prove-up.Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patricia L. Van Steenberge. There being no appearance by either party in this matter, the Court ordered the matter off calendar.

STATUS CONFERENCE
